project: apra-fleet #210 — Members stuck in busy state

tasks.title: Trace and document every exit path in execute-prompt.ts
tasks.notes: Added comprehensive comment block documenting all 7 exit paths: success, non-zero code, exception, AbortSignal, stale session retry, server overload retry, early returns.

tasks.title: Move writeStatusline() clear to finally block
tasks.notes: Moved writeStatusline() clear to finally block (line 255). Updated catch block to only mark offline for genuine SSH/network errors, not cancellations. All exit paths now properly clear busy state.
